results.name: 0xAlex
results.bio: Marketing & KOL Manager | 150+ Successful clients | Building creator campaigns
results.text:
A Web3 marketing agency is not an ad agency.

The confusion is costing projects millions.

Most founders think hiring a Web3 agency means running some Twitter posts and buying influencer shoutouts.

Here's what a serious Web3 marketing agency actually delivers:

─ Narrative & Positioning: crafting the story that resonates with crypto-native audiences
─ Community Architecture: building Discord/TG ecosystems with real retention loops
─ KOL Management: identifying, briefing, and managing Key Opinio
